title: Vacaciones eDreams, S.L — Consumer harm
investigation_objective: Paid $59,400 in ACCC infringement notices and gave a court-enforceable s.87B undertaking over allegedly misleading subscription pricing practices (advertising a subscription as '$0.00'/'FREE' without adequately disclosing conditions, and not prominently displaying total annual cost).
scope: Paid $59,400 in ACCC infringement notices for allegedly misleading subscription pricing claims; Gave the ACCC a court-enforceable undertaking (s.87B) admitting conduct contravened or likely contravened the Australian Consumer Law
